title: Mediterranean Chickpea Salad
overview: A vibrant, protein-packed salad with chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, olives, and feta tossed in a lemon-herb dressing.

title: Avocado & Tomato Wholegrain Toast
overview: Creamy smashed avocado and ripe tomatoes on toasted wholegrain bread — a quick, nutrient-dense breakfast or snack.

title: One-Pan Lemon Garlic Salmon with Asparagus
overview: Flaky salmon fillets roasted alongside tender asparagus spears with bright lemon and garlic — all on one pan.

title: Quinoa Veggie Power Bowl
overview: Fluffy quinoa topped with roasted vegetables, leafy greens, and a tahini drizzle for a filling, balanced meal.

title: Sweet Potato & Black Bean Tacos
overview: Smoky roasted sweet potato and seasoned black beans piled into warm corn tortillas with fresh salsa and lime.

title: Greek Yogurt Berry Parfait
overview: Layers of thick Greek yogurt, mixed berries, and crunchy granola make this a speedy, wholesome breakfast.

title: Lentil & Spinach Soup
overview: A hearty, warming soup of red lentils, wilted spinach, and aromatic spices — ready in under 30 minutes.

title: Banana Oat Pancakes
overview: Naturally sweet two-ingredient pancakes made with ripe banana and oats — gluten-free and ready in minutes.
